nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Cron every 15 min. Joins recent sentinel_workflow_health (last 30 min) + sentinel_endpoint_health (latest) against sentinel_health_thresholds, raises health alerts via the alert-router. Aggregation_key prevents alert spam.

parameters.jsCode:
const summary = $('Evaluate').first().json;
return { json: { ok: true, workflows_analyzed: summary.workflows_analyzed, endpoints_analyzed: summary.endpoints_analyzed, alerts_raised: (summary.alerts || []).length } };
